name: Country Chicken Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions, celery, green pepper in butter until soft.
2. Blend in flour, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
3. Add chicken broth, peas, corn and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until mixture is thickened and bubbly.
4. Combine onion mixture with chicken and pour into a greased 2 qt casserole.
5. Put the casserole in a hot oven at 425°F while you make the biscuits.
6. Prepare biscuit mix using 2/3 cup milk as directed on package.
7. Turn onto a lightly floured surface and knead a few times.
8. Roll out to an 8-inch square; sprinkle with cheese.
9. Roll as for jelly roll, sealing the edges.
10. Cut 8 slices 1-inch thick.
11. Place slices on hot chicken mixture in casserole and sprinkle with paprika.
12. Bake until biscuits are lightly browned, about 25 minutes.
